name: Makana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. About 3 - 4 large, they can be overripe and black.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
3. Chop walnuts in blender (remove nuts from blender and set aside).
4. Cut bananas into pieces; puree in blender jar.
5. With electric mixer, cream sugar and shortening at medium speed.
6. Add eggs to creamed mixture and beat until light and fluffy.
7. Add pureed banana mixture to the above.
8. Mix together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk.
9. Mix thoroughly.
10. Fold in nuts.
11. Pour into greased and floured tube pan (a loaf bread pan can also be used).
12. Bake 60 - 70 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
13. Cool in pan on a wire rack for 1 hour, then remove to serving dish.
